---
title: "PAPER TITLE"
author:
  - name: "First Author"
    affiliation: "Department, Institution, City, Country"
    email: "corresponding@email.edu"
    corresponding: true
  - name: "Second Author"
    affiliation: "Department, Institution, City, Country"
date: today
date-format: long

# JAE SUMMARY (≤100 words, no citations)
abstract: |
  Replace this with your summary. Must be 100 words or fewer.
  Must not contain citations. Should condense the entire paper,
  not just the conclusions.

# JAE requires up to 6 keywords
keywords:
  - keyword one
  - keyword two
  - keyword three

format:
  pdf:
    documentclass: article
    classoption: [12pt, letterpaper]

    # 1-inch margins on all sides
    geometry:
      - margin=1in

    # Double spacing (JAE requirement)
    linestretch: 2

    # Latin Modern — safe, professional, no licensing issues
    fontfamily: lmodern

    # Numbered sections (1, 1.1, 1.1.1)
    number-sections: true
    number-depth: 3

    # Keep .tex for debugging; disable for clean submission
    keep-tex: true

    # PDF metadata
    colorlinks: false
    linkcolor: black
    citecolor: black
    urlcolor: black

    # LaTeX packages and preamble
    include-in-header:
      text: |
        % ---- Core packages ----
        \usepackage{booktabs}       % Three-rule tables (no vertical lines)
        \usepackage{setspace}       % Line spacing control
        \usepackage{natbib}         % Author-year citations
        \usepackage{float}          % [H] placement specifier
        \usepackage{placeins}       % \FloatBarrier to pin floats to sections
        \usepackage{caption}        % Caption formatting
        \usepackage{microtype}      % Better justification and hyphenation
        \usepackage{amsmath}        % Math environments
        \usepackage{amssymb}        % Math symbols

        % ---- Caption style ----
        % Tables: caption ABOVE (JAE convention)
        % Figures: caption BELOW (JAE convention)
        \captionsetup[table]{
          position=top,
          labelfont=bf,
          labelsep=newline,
          justification=justified,
          singlelinecheck=false,
          textfont=normalsize
        }
        \captionsetup[figure]{
          position=bottom,
          labelfont=bf,
          labelsep=period,
          justification=justified
        }

        % ---- Table label style: "TABLE 1" in bold caps ----
        \renewcommand{\tablename}{\textbf{TABLE}}
        \renewcommand{\figurename}{\textbf{FIGURE}}

        % ---- Equation numbering: (1), (2), ... ----
        % Default LaTeX numbering is already parenthesised — no change needed.

        % ---- Page numbering: centered footer, no header ----
        \usepackage{fancyhdr}
        \pagestyle{fancy}
        \fancyhf{}
        \fancyfoot[C]{\thepage}
        \renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}
        \renewcommand{\footrulewidth}{0pt}
        % Apply to first page too
        \fancypagestyle{plain}{
          \fancyhf{}
          \fancyfoot[C]{\thepage}
          \renewcommand{\headrulewidth}{0pt}
        }

        % ---- Section heading style (H1 = bold all-caps) ----
        \usepackage{titlesec}
        \titleformat{\section}
          {\normalfont\bfseries\large}
          {\thesection.}{0.5em}
          {\MakeUppercase}
        \titleformat{\subsection}
          {\normalfont\bfseries\normalsize}
          {\thesubsection.}{0.5em}{}
        \titleformat{\subsubsection}
          {\normalfont\bfseries\normalsize}
          {\thesubsubsection.}{0.5em}{}

        % ---- Prevent widows and orphans ----
        \widowpenalty=10000
        \clubpenalty=10000

        % ---- Significance stars (redefine if using threeparttable) ----
        % * p<0.10  ** p<0.05  *** p<0.01

# ---- Bibliography ----
bibliography: references.bib
# jae.bst must be on the TeX path or in the working directory
# Download from: https://ctan.org/tex-archive/biblio/bibtex/contrib/economic
biblio-style: jae
natbiboptions: round
cite-method: natbib

---

<!-- ============================================================ -->
<!-- DOCUMENT BODY                                                  -->
<!-- ============================================================ -->

<!-- Abstract and keywords are rendered from YAML above -->

\newpage

# Introduction

Your introduction here. Use `\citep{key}` for parenthetical citations and
`\citet{key}` for narrative citations.

\FloatBarrier

# Background

\FloatBarrier

# Data and Methodology

## Data

## Empirical Strategy

\FloatBarrier

# Results

## Main Results

<!-- Example: include a static LaTeX table from analysis repo -->
<!--
\begin{table}[htbp]
\centering
\caption{Main results.}
\input{../analysis/output/tables/table_main.tex}
\begin{flushleft}
{\small \textit{Note.} Standard errors in parentheses.
*** $p<0.01$, ** $p<0.05$, * $p<0.10$.}
\end{flushleft}
\end{table}
-->

\FloatBarrier

## Robustness

\FloatBarrier

# Discussion

\FloatBarrier

# Conclusion

\newpage

# References {.unnumbered}

::: {#refs}
:::

\newpage

<!-- ============================================================ -->
<!-- APPENDIX                                                       -->
<!-- ============================================================ -->

\appendix
\renewcommand{\thesection}{\Alph{section}}
\renewcommand{\theequation}{\Alph{section}\arabic{equation}}
\renewcommand{\thetable}{\Alph{section}\arabic{table}}
\renewcommand{\thefigure}{\Alph{section}\arabic{figure}}
\setcounter{equation}{0}
\setcounter{table}{0}
\setcounter{figure}{0}

# Appendix A: Additional Results {.unnumbered}

Appendix content here. Equations are numbered (A1), (A2), tables as Table A1, etc.

\FloatBarrier
